posts.author: Adarsh_Patil
posts.text: Hedges Buy on expiry day of commodity — I understand the concern, sir. This is already a priority, and we are currently testing this internally. Since commodities are highly volatile right now, we just do not want to take any additional risk before proper testing and validation. We are working on this and will deploy it once testing is completed. Please allow us some more time for this, probably 4-6 weeks

posts.author: amitb
posts.text: Hedges Buy on expiry day of commodity — @nithin this was raised 3 months ago. A risk management basic requirement for selling options is all being asked. A seller should be able to buy hedge. Request to please advise the team to prioritize this.

posts.author: amitb
posts.text: Hedges Buy on expiry day of commodity — @Adarsh_Patil Please update on this. At least allow it in MIS
